title: Revolut hits $115 billion valuation as it becomes the first global fintech with an Australian banking licence
summary: Revolut reported revenue of nearly four and a half billion pounds in 2025, up 46 percent year over year, and pre-tax profit of close to two billion pounds, up 57 percent.
